reviewer_safe_one_sentence: register_or_disclosure_fiction is currently best treated as a bounded methods/dashboard overlay: the local package supports a cautious claim that public-sector AI disclosure surfaces differ in comparability and reconstruction value, but not a new top-level category claim.

do_not_claim: Do not describe this as a new LIMEN top-level category, a buyer-side procurement pattern, intentional deception, or a stable cross-jurisdiction disclosure regime.

next_upgrade_trigger: Add one second non-Dutch procurement notice, contract page, or public algorithm-register row into the same disclosure-comparison columns and re-test distinctiveness.
